title: coincya oxyrrhina
intro: Coincya oxyrrhina, also known as wild rocket or sea rocket, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which provide numerous health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Coincya oxyrrhina can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
